hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx) cd "/Users/chasebauman/Documents/App research codex/frontend" && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20 ;; esac; exit 0

python3 -c "import sys,json,os; t=json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','{}') or '{}'); f=t.get('file_path',''); n=os.path.basename(f); sys.exit(1 if n == '.env' else 0)" && exit 0 || (echo 'BLOCKED: Direct edits to .env are not allowed. Use .env.example or set values manually.' && exit 2)
